## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's AI-powered content optimization and creation services for potential partnership with BitSight.](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a managed service combining AI-powered content creation/optimization with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [BitSight has extensive existing content but seeks to improve LLM visibility and search performance](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach focuses on continuous content refreshing, fact-checking, and optimization for both search and AI citations](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Pricing model and exact deliverables for BitSight's use case require further discussion](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [Combines AI-powered platform with human expertise ("forward deploy strategist")](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality, well-researched content optimized for both search and AI citations](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Continuous content refreshing and optimization (ideal: refresh 1,800 pages every 3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Fact-checking, readability improvements, and cross-linking optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Agentic workflows for research, content creation, and quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)

### BitSight's Current Content Situation

  - [Extensive existing content (approx. 1,800 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Strong SEO performance, but seeking to improve LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Content creation not a primary need; focus on optimization and gap-filling](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Interest in prompt engineering capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)

### GrowthX's Client Results and Process

  - [Worked with 60+ customers, including security companies (e.g., Abnormal Security, Sentinel-1)](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Significant traffic and AI visibility improvements for clients (e.g., 10x AI visibility for some)](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Weekly strategy refinement meetings with clients](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Managed service model: GrowthX team handles content creation, optimization, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)

### Potential Partnership Considerations

  - [BitSight's need differs from typical use case (optimization vs. creation)](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Questions around pricing model and specific deliverables for BitSight's situation](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [Potential value in GrowthX's expertise for maintaining content freshness and AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)

## Next Steps

  - [BitSight to consider if GrowthX's managed service model aligns with their needs](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Potential follow-up discussion on pricing and services tailored to BitSight's optimization-focused requirements](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [BitSight to evaluate internal bottlenecks in content optimization process](https://fathom.video/share/Asyx8AHkW5v6dsg9P6XBRzFaW6kJczPS?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
